name: orbit
description: Tauri desktop shell + Vite/React/TypeScript UI. npm run dev = web only; npm run tauri dev = native window + dev server; npm run build = typecheck + production bundle to dist/; npm run tauri build = full app.

scripts.open:dmg: sh -c 'dmg=$(ls src-tauri/target/release/bundle/dmg/*.dmg 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -z "$dmg" ]; then echo "No DMG found. Run: npm run tauri build"; exit 1; fi; open "$dmg"'
